subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Prophets and Thy Messengers, by Thy chosen ones and Thy loved ones, and by the lights of Thy throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اسئلک بأنبیائک و رسلک و اصفیائک و اولیائک و بأنوار عرشک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
